goal: Worktree mode demo: parallel implementers + reviewer
assumptions: Run with -UseWorktrees to enable per-step git worktree isolation
Each step writes into its own branch; only OK steps merge into integration

steps.title: Implementer A approach
steps.task: Produce candidate review/patch A in isolated worktree branch uaitb/<run>/step-1

steps.title: Implementer B approach
steps.task: Produce candidate review/patch B in isolated worktree branch uaitb/<run>/step-2

steps.title: Reviewer selects winner
steps.task: Score A vs B with rubric; promote winner. Runs after both implementer worktrees have merged into integration.
